description_long: This is a large, ornate sword with a broad, double-edged blade that features a striking color gradient from dark black to silvery white, accented by a marbled pattern. The blade is thick and angular, with a geometric, almost futuristic design, and appears to be forged from metal. The hilt is highly decorative, cast in a gold or brass-like material with intricate, symmetrical patterns and a robust, ergonomic grip. The crossguard is prominent and angular, providing both protection and visual flair, while the pommel is capped with a matching metallic finish. The overall design suggests a ceremonial or fantasy-inspired weapon, blending both functional and ornamental elements. This sword would stand out in any urban context, whether as a display piece or a prop.
description: A large, ornate sword with a broad, angular blade and a highly decorative gold-toned hilt, featuring a striking black-to-silver gradient and intricate patterns.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the sword, highlighting the broad blade, marbled gradient, and detailed gold hilt.
description_view_1: Edge-on view emphasizing the thickness of the blade and the layered construction of the hilt.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the same blade and hilt details visible from the other side.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the handle side, showing the width of the hilt and the blade's thickness.
attribute_handle_design: ergonomic, gold-toned, ornate, symmetrical, metallic with decorative patterns
attribute_ornamentation: intricate gold patterns and geometric designs on hilt and guard
